title: Number of Dice Rolls with Target Sum
hints: Notice the problem involves making a choice for each die. Can you define a subproblem based on the number of dice remaining and the current target sum?
This structure suggests dynamic programming. The state should depend on the number of dice processed and the sum achieved so far.
For the transition, iterate through all possible face values of the current die. Add the ways to reach the previous sum for the remaining dice.
